## Privacy Policy

This personal portfolio is maintained by Sergio Santos and aims to present professional projects and articles. We respect your privacy and comply with the LGPD (Brazil) and GDPR (EU).

- **Essential cookies**: used only to ensure the basic functionality of the site.
- **Analytics cookies**: activated only with your explicit consent via the cookie banner.
- **Data sharing**: no personal data is sold or shared with third parties.

You can manage or revoke your preferences at any time.
